title: Festivals & events
subtitle: 39 celebrations through the year — pick a day to see what's on.

festivals.name: Founding Day of Saudi Arabia
festivals.description: National holiday commemorating the founding of the first Saudi state in 1727. Celebrated with parades, cultural events, and flag displays across the kingdom.

festivals.name: Janadriyah Festival
festivals.description: One of the world's largest cultural festivals showcasing Saudi heritage, traditional crafts, poetry, and folk performances. A major celebration of Arabian culture and identity.

festivals.name: Eid al-Fitr
festivals.description: Islamic festival marking the end of Ramadan with three days of celebration, family gatherings, and festivities. Public holiday with special prayers and traditional meals.

festivals.name: Asir Flowers Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of Asir's blooming season in the mountains with colorful flower displays and cultural performances. A picturesque festival showcasing the region's natural beauty.

festivals.name: Thallaj Winter Festival
festivals.description: Mountain festival in Asir celebrating the cooler climate and natural landscapes with activities, traditional crafts, and cultural shows. A unique summer escape destination.

festivals.name: Eid al-Adha
festivals.description: Major Islamic festival lasting four days commemorating Prophet Ibrahim's sacrifice. Marked by prayer services, animal sacrifices, feasts, and family celebrations nationwide.

festivals.name: Hajj Season
festivals.description: The world's largest annual religious gathering where millions of Muslims perform pilgrimage to the holiest sites in Islam. A profound spiritual and cultural phenomenon.

festivals.name: Saudi National Day
festivals.description: Annual celebration of Saudi Arabia's unification in 1932 with public holiday, fireworks, parades, and cultural performances. The kingdom's most important national celebration.

festivals.name: Riyadh Season
festivals.description: Three-month entertainment festival featuring concerts, cultural performances, food festivals, and family activities. A massive celebration of arts and culture in the capital.

festivals.name: Jeddah Season
festivals.description: Coastal entertainment festival featuring music, theater, food, and art events along the Red Sea. A cultural celebration unique to the port city.

festivals.name: Qassim Dates Festival
festivals.description: Annual celebration of Qassim's renowned date harvest with tastings, competitions, and traditional market displays. A showcase of the region's agricultural heritage.

festivals.name: Jizan Summer Festival
festivals.description: Coastal festival celebrating the season with marine activities, cultural shows, and traditional performances. Features the unique maritime heritage of southern Saudi Arabia.

festivals.name: Tantora Governorate Festival
festivals.description: Winter cultural festival in Al Khobar featuring music, theater, heritage events, and culinary experiences. A major celebration of contemporary and traditional arts.

festivals.name: Ha'il Equestrian Festival
festivals.description: Premier horse racing and equestrian sports festival celebrating Arabian horse culture and desert traditions. A highlight for equestrian enthusiasts worldwide.

festivals.name: Almajmaah Heritage Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating the historic Almajmaah region with traditional crafts, cultural performances, and heritage demonstrations. Showcases Najdi culture and history.

festivals.name: Tabuk Date & Olive Festival
festivals.description: Northern region's harvest festival featuring date and olive products with tastings, competitions, and agricultural displays. Celebrates the region's farming traditions.

festivals.name: Northern Borders Heritage Festival
festivals.description: Cultural celebration in Arar showcasing Bedouin traditions, crafts, poetry, and folklore of northern Saudi Arabia. Highlights the unique desert heritage of the region.

festivals.name: Najran Heritage Festival
festivals.description: Annual celebration of Najran's historical significance with traditional performances, handicrafts, and cultural displays. Showcases the southern region's unique identity.

festivals.name: Taif Rose Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of Taif's famous Damascus roses with floral displays, rose water products, and cultural events. A fragrant showcase of the region's agricultural specialty.

festivals.name: Medina Dates Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of Madinah's premium Ajwa dates during harvest season with exhibitions and tastings. Honors the city's most famous agricultural product.

festivals.name: Eastern Province Food Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of Gulf coastal cuisine with traditional dishes, cooking demonstrations, and cultural entertainment. Showcases the region's unique culinary heritage.

festivals.name: Islamic New Year
festivals.description: Religious observance marking the beginning of the Islamic calendar with special prayers and religious gatherings. A significant date in the Islamic year.

festivals.name: Mawlid al-Nabi (Prophet's Birthday)
festivals.description: Religious celebration of Prophet Muhammad's birth with special prayers, gatherings, and religious lectures. An important date in Islamic tradition.

festivals.name: Ramadan Month
festivals.description: The holiest month in Islam dedicated to fasting, prayer, and spiritual reflection from dawn to sunset. Marked by special evening prayers, family gatherings, and cultural activities.

festivals.name: Asir Coffee Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of traditional Arabian coffee culture with roasting demonstrations, tastings, and cultural performances. Honors the region's coffee heritage.

festivals.name: Jeddah International Film Festival
festivals.description: Major international film festival showcasing regional and international cinema with screenings and cultural events. A premier event for film enthusiasts.

festivals.name: Riyadh Contemporary Art Biennale
festivals.description: International contemporary art exhibition featuring installations, performances, and avant-garde works. Celebrates modern artistic expression in the capital.

festivals.name: Madinah Heritage Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating Madinah's rich Islamic history and heritage with cultural exhibits, educational programs, and traditional performances. Honors the city's spiritual significance.

festivals.name: Qassim Poetry Festival
festivals.description: Literary celebration featuring traditional and contemporary Arabic poetry with competitions, readings, and cultural discussions. A premier event for poetry enthusiasts.

festivals.name: Makkah Umrah Season
festivals.description: Peak season for Umrah pilgrimage attracting millions of visitors to the holy city for this lesser pilgrimage. A year-round spiritual journey with special significance during holidays.

festivals.name: Jizan Mango Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of Jizan's mango harvest with tastings, competitions, and agricultural exhibitions. Showcases the region's tropical fruit heritage.

festivals.name: Ha'il Handicrafts Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating traditional craftsmanship with textile weaving, pottery, and woodwork displays. Preserves and promotes the region's artisanal heritage.

festivals.name: Eastern Province Pearl Heritage Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of the region's pearl diving heritage with cultural performances, exhibitions, and maritime traditions. Honors the historical pearl industry.

festivals.name: Tabuk Winter Festival
festivals.description: Northern festival celebrating winter season with outdoor activities, cultural shows, and traditional market experiences. Features the unique culture of northwestern Saudi Arabia.

festivals.name: Najran Folk Arts Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of traditional folk arts and performances unique to southern Saudi culture. Features traditional music, dance, and theatrical presentations.

festivals.name: Alula Arts Festival
festivals.description: Contemporary art festival in the historic AlUla region combining modern artistic expression with ancient heritage sites. A unique blend of art and archaeology.

festivals.name: Riyadh Golf Cup
festivals.description: Premier golf tournament attracting international players to compete in championship events. A major sporting celebration in the capital.

festivals.name: Asir Mountain Festival
festivals.description: Adventure and cultural festival in the mountains featuring outdoor activities, traditional shows, and scenic celebrations. Highlights the region's natural beauty and culture.

festivals.name: Madinah Islamic Culture Week
festivals.description: Week-long celebration of Islamic heritage with lectures, exhibitions, and cultural programs. Emphasizes Madinah's role in Islamic civilization.
